sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55061" key="kata/rruqmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κατάρρυθμ-ος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n55061.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">very rhythmical</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Longin.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">41.1</biblScope></bibl>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n55061.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">κατάρυθμος</foreign>, prob. <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">f. l. for</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κακόρρυθμος</ref> </xr> in <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:2:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.11</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
